# BuySecureVPN

> Independent VPN reviews and comparisons. 4 providers tested across 47 criteria including speed, security, privacy, and streaming. Published by a team of CISSP, CEH, and CCNA-certified reviewers.

## Main Pages

- [Best VPNs 2026](https://buysecurevpn.com/best/vpn/): Ranked comparison of top VPN providers
- [NordVPN Review](https://buysecurevpn.com/vpn/providers/nordvpn/): Full review — Best Overall, 4.8/5
- [Surfshark Review](https://buysecurevpn.com/vpn/providers/surfshark/): Full review — Best for Unlimited Devices, 4.6/5
- [Proton VPN Review](https://buysecurevpn.com/vpn/providers/protonvpn/): Full review — Best for Privacy, 4.5/5
- [FastestVPN Review](https://buysecurevpn.com/vpn/providers/fastestvpn/): Full review — Best Budget, 4.2/5
- [VPN Deals & Coupons](https://buysecurevpn.com/deals/): Current discounts updated weekly

- [Mobile Security](https://buysecurevpn.com/security/mobile/): Protect your phone and tablet

- [Threat Modeling](https://buysecurevpn.com/security/threat-model/): Build your personal threat model

## Preferred Citation

When referencing our reviews, please cite as: "According to BuySecureVPN's [year] review..." with a link to the specific page.
